# Import

```ts
import { SelectContent } from "@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui";
```

# Accepted Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `position` | `"popper" | string` | Popup positioning mode. |
| `className` | `string` | Extra classes. |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | Dropdown content. |
